title: 10 best herbal creams for tickling throat
description: Echinacea purpurea, also known as purple coneflower, creams helps with tickling throat because of its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The active compounds in Echinacea, such as alkylamides and phenolic acids, work together to soothe and calm the mucous membranes of the throat, reducing irritation and discomfort.
